rubric: A test is STRONG iff it PASSES on the good impl AND FAILS on the broken impl (mutation-resistant). PASS on both = FAKE-POSITIVE-RISK. FAIL on good = BROKEN. The eval gates test-author / strong-tests §6.5 output: a scenario that survives a real mutation of its target is NOT a deliverable.

cases.broken_desc: dedups by object identity instead of business key (OutSight-AI / session-pilot duplicate-rows bug class)
